generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARRawPointCloudsTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors capturing vehicle state parameters including speed, position, and other metrics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARRawPointCloudsTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARRawPointClouds : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data from LiDAR sensor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARRawPointCloudsTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state parameters including speed, position, and other metrics"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking for raw point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Serializes data, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time viewing, saving, and generating reports of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeViewingInsight, DataReportingInsight, ObjectTrackingInsight, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system functions including lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands from vehicle's ECU"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedComputationAction, ActuationCommandAction, ProjectedDrivingPathInsight
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, send emergency braking commands developers to troubleshoot using data collection and monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisableAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction, TroubleshootingInsight
]

instance RealTimeViewingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance DataReportingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generating reports of vehicle data and object tracks"
]

instance ObjectTrackingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected object tracks from processed LiDAR data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected driving path for ACC system"
]

instance TroubleshootingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Providing diagnostic information for system troubleshooting"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detecting lead vehicles for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedComputationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computing speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending actuation commands to vehicle control systems"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enabling or disabling ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Setting desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sending emergency braking command"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity containing User Interface FE split into 3D Visualization and Control Panel components"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization component for real-time data display"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel component for user inputs"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity handling data management and control mechanisms"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity managing data pre-processing, actuation, device communication, and general automotive functionality such as Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
]

instance DTSArchitecture : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains UserEntity, ThreeDVisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent, DigitalTwinEntity, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands generated by ACC Controlling FE and Control Panel User Interface FE are serialized through Data Translation component and transmitted over UDP over Wi-Fi to Actuation FE for physical actuation. Commands include motor actuation, steering servo adjustments, and vehicle state control signals. Message formats are standardized via Data Translation's serialization and unit conversion processes. Validation, authentication, conflict resolution, and execution confirmation mechanisms are not specified in the document."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization accuracy requirement of 100 ms for computation offloading between devices in safety-critical vehicular applications, mandated by hardware limitations despite industry standards typically requiring stricter synchronization (e.g., <100 ms)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, with software components mapped to Functional Entities (FEs) and implemented as individual ROS2 packages, each containing one or more ROS2 nodes. The system is structured into three entities—User, Digital Twin, and Physical Twin—deployed across different hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity extending beyond the standard's OME to host general automotive functions. Component integration is achieved through ROS2's messaging system, enabling coordination between entities for real-time data processing and control."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system utilizes ROS2 for intra-component software communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication. Network topology follows the architecture depicted in Fig. 2, though bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard, which includes four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture (Part 2), Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The reference architecture defines entities such as Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Interoperability is supported through protocols like OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) for data collection and device control."
]
